title: plumaria latifolia
intro: Plumaria latifolia, also known as Rauwolifa, is a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as their ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The health benefits of Plumaria latifolia include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of Plumaria latifolia include tea infusions, extracts, and capsules, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
